title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXV. Relics.
content:
If a body meet a body,
            In a field of fitches;
        Can a body tell a body
            Where a body itches?
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXV. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
